description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage and a job named tests that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/craigbarnes/dockerfiles/lua-testing. In the test job run apt-get update && apt-get -y install libmarkdown2-dev, then for each Lua version 5.4 5.3 5.2 5.1 execute luarocks --lua-version=$v --tree=/usr make DISCOUNT_INCDIR=/usr/include/x86_64-linux-gnu DISCOUNT_LIBDIR=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu and lua$v test.lua. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are defined.
